name: @xtruder/opencode-claude-max-plugin
description: OpenCode plugin for Claude Max/Pro subscription via @anthropic-ai/sdk - uses Claude Code OAuth credentials

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./build --target node --format esm --packages external && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir build
scripts.dev: bun run dev:config && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./build --target node --format esm --packages external --watch

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: bun run lint && bun run format:check
